response.justification: Sarah Smith has extensive software engineering experience across multiple languages and domains, including recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, which aligns well with the role. However, her resume lacks explicit mention of key GenAI technologies like vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent system frameworks. Her strong full-stack background and cloud experience (AWS CDK) are positives, but the gap in AI-specific expertise reduces her fit.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with recent AI-agent infrastructure experience
Proven ability to lead technical projects and mentor teams
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS CDK) and containerization (Docker)
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or multi-agent systems
Limited details on GenAI production experience beyond infrastructure
Education is primarily in computer science without advanced AI/ML degrees
